TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mauritus, title = Mauritus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mauritus} }

S.FORM: Mauritus hya' ga cyux maki' tay 20 17 S, 57 33 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2,040 sq km (maki' tay 181ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,030 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,348,242. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 43.80%, lhlahuy hya' ga 17.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 38.90%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Port Louis. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay cyugal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ameenah Gurib, aring ryax 5 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Mauritus hya' ga cyux maki' tay 20 17 S, 57 33 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2,040 sq km (maki' tay 181ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,030 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,348,242. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 43.80%, lhlahuy hya' ga 17.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 38.90%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Port Louis. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay cyugal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ameenah Gurib, aring ryax 5 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: mauritus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a ** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a port louis~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ameenańß …£uriő≤, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
